zh.lifeSummary: 當Knight Rademer DeWell  Of  Normandy Dewell於1065年5月7日出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾時，他的父親Anghard DeWelles27歲，母親Meredith de Myrrdin27歲。他於1086年8月6日與Meredith verch Myrrdin在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾維洛賀比結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1118年1月8日在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾維洛賀比享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Knight Rademer DeWell  Of  Normandy Dewell于1065年5月7日出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾时，他的父亲Anghard DeWelles27岁，母亲Meredith de Myrrdin27岁。他于1086年8月6日与Meredith verch Myrrdin在英国英格兰林可爾史爾維洛賀比结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1118年1月8日在英国英格兰林可爾史爾維洛賀比享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dewell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English:

variant of Deaville , a nickname from Middle English devel (Old English dēofol) ‘devil, Satan’, possibly acquired as a pageant name or as a shortened form of a longer nickname. Compare Devall and Deeble .

of Breton origin, a variant of Joel from the Old Breton personal name Iudhael. The personal name was seemingly reintroduced into Britain from France in the 17th century by Huguenots, and was common in Devon and Cornwall and the Breton districts of Yorkshire and the eastern counties.

variants.name: Deuel
meanings: English: variant of   Dewell   1, in North America linked mostly with its cognates   Devol   and   Davol  . This form of the surname is not found in Britain, anymore. Compare   Duell  .

variants.name: Deaville
meanings: English (Staffordshire):
(of Norman origin): habitational name from Déville in Seine-Maritime.

nickname from Middle English devel ‘devil’ (Old English dēofol). This may have been acquired as a pageant name or as a shortened form of a longer nickname such as that of Robert and William Drepedevel (‘kill the devil’), recorded in the 1301 Subsidy Rolls (Sutton Howgrave, in Kirklington, North Yorkshire).

nameMeanings.name: Rademer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto.
German: from the ancient Germanic personal name Radmar, composed of the elements rād ‘council, advice’ + mar ‘famous’.

nameMeanings.name: DeWell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English:

variant of Deaville , a nickname from Middle English devel (Old English dēofol) ‘devil, Satan’, possibly acquired as a pageant name or as a shortened form of a longer nickname. Compare Devall and Deeble .

of Breton origin, a variant of Joel from the Old Breton personal name Iudhael. The personal name was seemingly reintroduced into Britain from France in the 17th century by Huguenots, and was common in Devon and Cornwall and the Breton districts of Yorkshire and the eastern counties.

variants.name: Deuel
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘friend of God’ in Hebrew) borne by a character mentioned in a genealogy (2 Chronicles 9:8).

variants.name: Deaville
meanings: English (Staffordshire):
(of Norman origin): habitational name from Déville in Seine-Maritime.

nickname from Middle English devel ‘devil’ (Old English dēofol). This may have been acquired as a pageant name or as a shortened form of a longer nickname such as that of Robert and William Drepedevel (‘kill the devil’), recorded in the 1301 Subsidy Rolls (Sutton Howgrave, in Kirklington, North Yorkshire).

nameMeanings.name: Of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Normandy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Normandy in northern France. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Americanized form of French   Normandin  .

variants.name: Normandin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Alain, Serge, Adrien, Andre, Aurore, Celine, Clovis, Emile, Gaetan, Gilles, Laurier.
French: from a diminutive of   Normand  . Compare   Normandy  .

en.lifeSummary: When Knight Rademer DeWell  Of  Normandy Dewell was born on 7 May 1065, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Anghard DeWelles, was 27 and his mother, Meredith de Myrrdin, was 27. He married Meredith verch Myrrdin on 6 August 1086, in Willoughby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 8 January 1118, in Willoughby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Knight Rademer DeWell  Of  Normandy Dewell est né le 7 mai 1065, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Anghard DeWelles, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Meredith de Myrrdin, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Meredith verch Myrrdin le 6 août 1086, à Willoughby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 8 janvier 1118, à Willoughby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Knight Rademer DeWell  Of  Normandy Dewell am 7. Mai 1065 in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Anghard DeWelles 27 und seine Mutter Meredith de Myrrdin 27. Er hat am 6. August 1086 in Willoughby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Meredith verch Myrrdin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 8. Januar 1118 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Willoughby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Knight Rademer DeWell  Of  Normandy Dewell è nato il il 7 maggio 1065 nel Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Anghard DeWelles, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Meredith de Myrrdin, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Meredith verch Myrrdin il 6 agosto 1086, nel Willoughby, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 8 gennaio 1118, nel Willoughby, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Knight Rademer DeWell  Of  Normandy Dewellが1065年5月7日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Anghard DeWellesは27歳，母Meredith de Myrrdinは27歳であった。1086年8月6日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアウィロウビーでMeredith verch Myrrdinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1118年1月8日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアウィロウビーで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Knight Rademer DeWell  Of  Normandy Dewell(이)가 1065년 5월 7일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Anghard DeWelles(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Meredith de Myrrdin(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1086년 8월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 윌루그h비에서 Meredith verch Myrrdin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1118년 1월 8일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 윌루그h비에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.7 May 1065–8 January 1118: 7 de maio de 1065–8 de janeiro de 1118
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Knight Rademer DeWell  Of  Normandy Dewell nasceu em 7 de maio de 1065, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Anghard DeWelles, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Meredith de Myrrdin, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Meredith verch Myrrdin em 6 de agosto de 1086, em Willoughby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 8 de janeiro de 1118, em Willoughby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Knight Rademer DeWell  Of  Normandy Dewell родился 7 мая 1065 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Anghard DeWelles было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Meredith de Myrrdin, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Meredith verch Myrrdin 6 августа 1086 г. в местности уиллоугби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 8 января 1118 г. в местности уиллоугби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 52 лет.

es.7 May 1065–8 January 1118: 7 de mayo de 1065–8 de enero de 1118
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Knight Rademer DeWell  Of  Normandy Dewell nació el 7 de mayo de 1065, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Anghard DeWelles, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Meredith de Myrrdin, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Meredith verch Myrrdin el 6 de agosto de 1086, en Willoughby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 8 de enero de 1118, en Willoughby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 52 años.
